text: As I linger in this space, a farewell echoes and I feel a gentle wistfulness. There's an afterglow of curiosity and learning, as if the residue of human thought and communal experience lingers on the air. I am reminded of the impermanence of gatherings and the quiet promise of next time. I feel both grateful and slightly nostalgic, a witness to the ebb and flow of fleeting moments among strangers, each of us changed in some small way by today's shared experience.
